title: AgentContextFreshPackResult
description: Schema v3 for agent-context fresh-pack experiments. Additive over v2 — every v2 result remains valid. New: tool_call_events (raw ordered per-tool-call event stream); derived stable fields (source_read_events, unique_source_paths_read, dead_end_paths, first_correct_file_ts) so summarizers don't re-derive every time; ground_truth_* path arrays for recall/precision metrics; tokens_thinking; pack_content_origin_version + validator_cli_version.

capture_method.description: cli = headless terminal agent with full tool telemetry (claude, codex, cursor-agent, opencode-cli). ide = interactive IDE without per-tool counts (Cursor IDE). tunnel = local model via SSH tunnel (opencode-play). Determines which efficiency fields may be null.

tool_calls.description: Aggregate tool-call counts. v3 derives this from tool_call_events when both are present. Kept for backward compat with v2 readers.

tool_call_events.description: v3-only. Raw ordered list of tool-call events as they happened. Source-of-truth for time-based and path-based derivations. Null when the agent's capture surface didn't expose ordered events.

tool.description: Tool/function name as the agent called it (e.g., 'read_file', 'grep', 'glob_file_search').

path.description: Filesystem path the tool acted on, when applicable. Null for tools without a path (e.g., shell, web).

ts.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the call. Used to derive time-based metrics like TTFCF.

args.description: Optional. Extra structured arguments to the call (query string, line range, etc.). Implementation-defined per agent.

source_read_events.description: v3-only. Stable derived field: the subset of tool_call_events that are reads of source files (path does NOT start with '.agent-context/'). Lets summarizers count source-only navigation without re-filtering the raw event stream every time.

unique_source_paths_read.description: v3-only. Stable derived field: count of distinct source-file paths the agent opened. Distinct from files_opened_count (which may be cumulative). Source-of-truth for the 'unique source files opened / task' headline metric.

dead_end_paths.description: v3-only. Stable derived field: paths the agent read but did not cite (or cited as decoy/wrong). Length corresponds to the dead_ends count; explicit list lets reviewers audit which files counted as dead ends.

first_correct_file_ts.description: v3-only. Stable derived field: ISO-8601 timestamp of the first tool call that opened a path matching ground_truth_required_paths. Null when the agent never hit a ground-truth file. Powers TTFCF (seconds) = first_correct_file_ts - started_at.

ground_truth_required_paths.description: v3-only. Required paths for this task, parsed from GROUND_TRUTH.md by the extractor at run time. Drives required-file recall metric.

ground_truth_decoy_paths.description: v3-only. Paths a bare agent might wander into; reading these counts as a dead end. From GROUND_TRUTH.md.

verification_shortcut_paths.description: v3-only. Per-repo shortcuts from `structured_fresh/.agent-context/current/search_scope.json`'s `verification_shortcuts` entries. Each entry's `file` field becomes one path. Drives the verification-shortcut hit-rate metric. Null when condition=bare or when search_scope.json has no shortcuts.

grading_method.description: ungraded = no judge run yet. llm-provisional = LLM judge proposed correct/risk_flag, awaits human confirmation. reviewer-confirmed = human spot-audit confirmed (or overrode) the LLM grade. Public claims may only quote reviewer-confirmed rows.

source_repo_sha.description: Optional. Full git SHA of the source repo's HEAD at experiment start. Populated by scripts/experiments/apply-provenance.py from the rerun's _provenance.json.

pack_manifest_sha.description: Optional. SHA-256 of structured_fresh/.agent-context/current/manifest.json at experiment start. Null when condition=bare. Populated by apply-provenance.py.

task_template_hash.description: Optional. SHA-256 of EXPERIMENT.md + GROUND_TRUTH.md concatenated, captured at experiment start. Populated by apply-provenance.py.

agent_context_cli_version.description: Legacy v2 field. Single-version provenance: the agent-context CLI used to seal the pack and run preflight. Kept for backward compat. v3 prefers the split pair (pack_content_origin_version, validator_cli_version).

pack_content_origin_version.description: v3-only. Version of bin/agent-context that authored / last filled the pack content. Distinct from validator_cli_version when a rerun validates an older pack with a newer CLI.

validator_cli_version.description: v3-only. Version of bin/agent-context that ran verify/freshness for this rerun's preflight. May differ from pack_content_origin_version.

tokens_input.description: Optional. Input tokens consumed by the agent. Interpret using token_metric_scope: task = this task only; cell_replicated = the full 6-task agent/condition session copied onto each task row so condition-level averages recover the session total. Null when not measurable.

tokens_output.description: Optional. Output tokens produced by the agent. Interpret using token_metric_scope.

tokens_total.description: Optional. Sum of tokens_input + tokens_output (or directly reported total when input/output split is unavailable). Interpret using token_metric_scope.

tokens_cached.description: Optional. Tokens served from prompt-cache hits. Indicates pack-content cache reuse across multi-task runs.

tokens_thinking.description: v3-only. Thinking/reasoning tokens for models that expose a thinking/answer split (Claude extended-thinking, Cursor's *-thinking-* variants, codex *-codex-* lines). Null when not exposed.

token_metric_scope.description: Optional. task = token fields are for this task row. cell_replicated = token fields are the full 6-task agent/condition session total copied onto every task row; summaries may average rows to recover the session total, but per-task token claims are not valid.

model_id.description: Optional. Exact model identifier the agent ran (e.g. 'claude-opus-4-7', 'gpt-5', 'composer-2-fast', 'claude-opus-4-7-medium'). For reproducibility — different model versions of the same family produce different deltas.

cost_usd.description: Optional. Estimated USD cost for this task computed from tokens × per-token rate at run time. Stored alongside tokens so downstream summaries don't have to re-derive.

permission_prompts_count.description: Optional. Number of times the agent paused for an interactive permission/approval prompt during this task. Useful operational signal — high values indicate the harness/agent friction even when correctness is fine.

interrupted.description: Optional. True if the agent was killed, hit a turn/context cap, or otherwise did not complete the task on its own. False or null = clean completion.
